opt_out.muted: 🔕 Got it — we'll stop sending you promotional nudges. Order confirmations and account notices still come through. Reply unmute any time to re-enable promos.
opt_out.unmuted: 🔔 Promos re-enabled. We'll only send you helpful ones — promise.

start.already_on_menu: 👆 You're already on the main menu — tap a button above.

vps.start_404: ❌ This VPS ({name}) no longer exists on the provider. It may have been cancelled or never finished provisioning. Tap Delete VPS to clear it from your list, then create a new one — or contact support.
vps.start_423: ⏳ Your VPS ({name}) is locked — provisioning or an earlier action is still in progress.  Please try again in 2 minutes.
vps.start_409: ⚠️ VPS ({name}) is in a conflicting state for this action.  It may already be running, or another start/stop is in progress.  Refresh the menu to see current state.
vps.start_5xx_provider: ⚠️ The VPS provider is temporarily unreachable.  Please try again in a few minutes.
vps.start_500: ⚠️ The VPS provider returned an internal error for {name}.  We've been notified — please retry in a minute, or contact support if it persists.

wallet.balance_short: 💳 Wallet: ${balance} — plans start at $20; top up first to skip the deposit step at checkout.
